title: Kontakt!
writer: Odd Grythe, Oluf Reed Olsen, Jørn Ording
actors: Oluf Reed Olsen, Hjelm Basberg, Ottomar Elligers
plot: This is about the illegal radio station, AKY and the men that operated it in Norway, based in Kristiansand and Oslo, that helped carry the fight to the Nazis in the bleakest days of WW2.
